text.message: He was here when he chose
This is a classic case where the bot wins
Because I have no other block of you?
Would have to be the 3 wood which does nothing
Lol, are you asking me to go for the bot while blocking me?
I was in a far worse position than you when you blocked me over the bot
Think this actually might be the new meta. Leave instantly, let bot play while getting ignored all game, then join when at 8 points
Phew, thought it was me there for a second
Going for second place here. Wish me luck
